summary: Tested analytics/free-tier/feedback backend APIs and frontend routing. All 9 backend tests passed. Frontend routing verified via Playwright.

issues: HomeScreen cannot be accessed via Playwright because Supabase env vars are blank → user=null always → ProtectedRoute always redirects to /login. HomeScreen data-testid attributes verified via source code review only.

critical_code_review_comments: HomeScreen is accessible in production when users are authenticated, but in this preview env (blank Supabase keys) it cannot be E2E browser-tested — ProtectedRoute always redirects. All data-testid attributes (app-title, capture-button, upload-button, signup-wall) verified via source code inspection.
signup-wall correctly defaults to showSignupWall=false, so it will not render on normal page load — confirmed by code.

success_rate.frontend: 80% (routing/login tested via Playwright; HomeScreen tested via code review only)

seed_data_creation: Seeded anon_enforce_ui (analysis_count=3) via pytest fixture; cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All analytics/free-tier/feedback tests pass. Backend: anonymous check, limit enforcement (403), invalid JWT → 503, feedback CRUD (400/409/200) all verified. Frontend: /login redirect works, no Google button, login page renders. HomeScreen data-testid attributes verified by code review — cannot be browser-tested due to blank Supabase env vars in preview.
test_credentials: None required — no auth configured in this env
